languages.text: "Я рад был разделить свои думы, деяния и молчание с вами, {name}. Нет высшего блага, чем познать себя и быть познанным другим — ведь познание есть промысел Омниссии".
"I was pleased to share my thoughts, deeds, and silence with you, {name}. There is no higher good than to know oneself and to be known by another — for knowledge is the providence of the Omnissiah."
languages.original_text: "Я рад был разделить свои думы, деяния и молчание с вами, {name}. Нет высшего блага, чем познать себя и быть познанным другим — ведь познание есть промысел Омниссии".

traits.locale_text: "I was pleased to share my thoughts, deeds, and silence with you, {name}. There is no higher good than to know oneself and to be known by another — for knowledge is the providence of the Omnissiah."
"I was pleased to share my thoughts, deeds, and silence with you, {name}. There is no higher good than to know oneself and to be known by another — for knowledge is the providence of the Omnissiah."
"I was pleased to share my thoughts, deeds, and silence with you, {name}. There is no higher good than to know oneself and to be known by another — for knowledge is the providence of the Omnissiah."

languages.text: «Me ha alegrado poder compartir conocimientos, acciones y silencio con usted, {name}. No hay mayor bien que conocerse a uno mismo y que otros le conozcan a uno, ya que el conocimiento es el don del Omnissiah».
languages.original_text: "I was pleased to share my thoughts, deeds, and silence with you, {name}. There is no higher good than to know oneself and to be known by another — for knowledge is the providence of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: «Me ha alegrado poder compartir conocimientos, acciones y silencio con usted, {name}. No hay mayor bien que conocerse a uno mismo y que otros le conozcan a uno, ya que el conocimiento es el don del Omnissiah».

languages.text: “能与您分享我的思绪、行动，乃至我的沉默，我深感欣慰，{name}。世上没有比了解自己、也被他人了解更高的善行了——因为知识正是欧姆尼赛亚的恩赐。”
languages.original_text: "I was pleased to share my thoughts, deeds, and silence with you, {name}. There is no higher good than to know oneself and to be known by another — for knowledge is the providence of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: “能与您分享我的思绪、行动，乃至我的沉默，我深感欣慰，{name}。世上没有比了解自己、也被他人了解更高的善行了——因为知识正是欧姆尼赛亚的恩赐。”

languages.text: « Ce fut un plaisir de partager mes pensées, mes agissements et mes silences avec vous, {name}. Il n'existe pas de plus grande bénédiction que de se connaître soi-même et d'être connu d'un autre, car la connaissance est la providence de l'Omnimessie. »
languages.original_text: "I was pleased to share my thoughts, deeds, and silence with you, {name}. There is no higher good than to know oneself and to be known by another — for knowledge is the providence of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: « Ce fut un plaisir de partager mes pensées, mes agissements et mes silences avec vous, {name}. Il n'existe pas de plus grande bénédiction que de se connaître soi-même et d'être connu d'un autre, car la connaissance est la providence de l'Omnimessie. »

languages.text: "Düşüncelerimi, eylemlerimi ve sessizliğimi sizinle paylaşmaktan memnuniyet duydum. İnsanın kendini bilmesinden ve bir başkasınca bilinmesinden daha yüce bir iyilik yoktur. Zira irfan, Hermesih'in takdiridir."
languages.original_text: "I was pleased to share my thoughts, deeds, and silence with you, {name}. There is no higher good than to know oneself and to be known by another — for knowledge is the providence of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "Düşüncelerimi, eylemlerimi ve sessizliğimi sizinle paylaşmaktan memnuniyet duydum. İnsanın kendini bilmesinden ve bir başkasınca bilinmesinden daha yüce bir iyilik yoktur. Zira irfan, Hermesih'in takdiridir."

languages.text: 「あなたと、思考と、行いと、沈黙を分かち合えたこと、嬉しく思います、{name}。己を知り、そして他者に知られること以上の善はありません――知識とは、オムニッシアの摂理なのですから」
languages.original_text: "I was pleased to share my thoughts, deeds, and silence with you, {name}. There is no higher good than to know oneself and to be known by another — for knowledge is the providence of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたと、思考と、行いと、沈黙を分かち合えたこと、嬉しく思います、{name}。己を知り、そして他者に知られること以上の善はありません――知識とは、オムニッシアの摂理なのですから」

languages.text: "Es war mir eine Ehre, meine Gedanken, meine Taten und mein Schweigen mit Euch zu teilen, {name}. Es gibt kein höheres Gut, als sich selbst zu kennen und gekannt zu werden ... denn Wissen ist die Providenz des Omnissiah."
languages.original_text: "I was pleased to share my thoughts, deeds, and silence with you, {name}. There is no higher good than to know oneself and to be known by another — for knowledge is the providence of the Omnissiah."

traits.locale_text: "Es war mir eine Ehre, meine Gedanken, meine Taten und mein Schweigen mit Euch zu teilen, {name}. Es gibt kein höheres Gut, als sich selbst zu kennen und gekannt zu werden ... denn Wissen ist die Providenz des Omnissiah."
